chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1682 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 01.12.2016. Mr. Mushtaque Hussain Kalwar, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Asif Arain, Advocate for respondents No.5, 7 and 14 alongwith respondents. Mr. Ashfaque Nabi Kazi, Assistant A.G a/w SIP Allahdad Chandio SHO P.S Tando Adam City and SIP Afzal Magsi, SHO Piaro Lund District Tando Allahyar. = Today, the private respondents No.5, 7 and 14 are present alongwith their Counsel Mr. Muhammad Asif Arain, who submits that private respondents have not caused any harassment to the petitioners and after the earlier round of litigation they have not even contacted them. This position has been seriously disputed by the petitioners’ Counsel and submits that till date the petitioners are not even allowed to reside in their own ancestral village in Tando Adam. Today, SHO Allahdad Chandio of P.S Tando Adam is present, who is directed to ensure legal protection to the petitioners and in this regard he will take a Bond from respondents present today in Court. This petition is disposed of in view of the above observations and with the directions that the respondents shall not cause any harassment to the petitioners and the concerned police officials will provide them legal protection especially when the petitioners go back to their ancestral village to resume their residence there. Respondents and police officials are cautioned that violation of this order shall be considered as Contempt of Court. JUDGE Shahid
